title: New Door
description: Updated textures for doors and hatches
body:
This texture pack brings fresh touches to the familiar world of Minecraft by improving the look of certain doors and trapdoors. The updated textures are sharper, more detailed, and more pleasant to the eye, while preserving the original style of the game.

New shades, clean lines, and improved detailing will make your builds feel more atmospheric — whether it’s a cozy cabin, a castle, or a modern house. Perfect for both single-player and multiplayer builds, it doesn’t change gameplay, only enhances its visual side.
